title: La bandera
writer: Pierre Mac Orlan, Julien Duvivier, Charles Spaak
actors: Annabella, Jean Gabin, Robert Le Vigan
plot: Pierre Gilieth has committed a murder in Paris. He flees to Barcelona, where he runs out of money. He joins the Spanish Foreign Legion and there he meets two fellow countrymen, Mulot and Lucas. He tries to forget his crime, but Lu...
